title: 4. Evaluating agent accuracy and regression metrics

blocks.content: As prompts and tools are modified, you must ensure the agent doesn't regress. Regression testing compares active runs against a benchmark list of known Q&A test cases.

items.title: Cosine Similarity
items.content: Measures semantic overlap of response embeddings against a golden standard.

items.title: Tool Call Auditing
items.content: Verifies the agent executes the correct tools in the correct order.

items.title: Assertion Passes
items.content: Runs boolean validation checks on returned data tables.

blocks.content:
Question 1: What is a 'golden dataset' in agent evaluation?
- A) An expensive dataset hosted on cloud nodes.
- B) A static collection of validated input-output pairs used to track regression.
- C) A system database storing user passwords.

Feedback: Option B is correct. Golden datasets benchmark model outputs.
